# Droplet of Precognition

## Description

Choose a card in your Draw Pile and add it into your Hand.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Save for elites/bosses by default; it can fetch a key block card, Bash/Vulnerable setup, or lethal attack from the draw pile without spending energy.
